text:
is a two disc album recording of a live performance at Bunkamura Orchard Hall on 22 May and 23 May 2017. It is part of the Godzilla x Evangelion collaboration. It was published by King Records via the label KING on 27 December 2017 with catalog numbers KICA-2522~3. The music was composed and arranged by Shirō Sagisu. It was performed by the Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra. https://vgmdb.net/album/72386
